{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = White Fox pillars
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The four [[White Fox pillars]] crumbled to rubble when [[Markuth]] called on the [[vital aura]] of the world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
